heading: Minority population participation
label: 5023 Minority population participation
text: The Director shall take appropriate steps to insure that special efforts are made to recruit, select, and assign qualified individuals age 55 years or older from minority populations to serve as volunteers under this subchapter.
notes: Amendments2009— substituted “population” for “group” in section catchline and “age 55 years or older from minority populations” for “sixty years and older from minority groups” in text.Pub. L. 111–13
